mapper.sql: A.EVENT_ID AS eventId , A.EVENT_SE AS eventSe , A.EVENT_NM AS eventNm , A.EVENT_PURPS AS eventPurps , A.EVENT_BGNDE AS eventBeginDe , A.EVENT_ENDDE AS eventEndDe , A.EVENT_AUSPC_INSTT_NM AS eventAuspcInsttNm , A.EVENT_MNGT_INSTT_NM AS eventMngtInsttNm , A.EVENT_PLACE AS eventPlace , A.EVENT_CN AS eventCn , A.CT_OCCRRNC_AT AS ctOccrrncAt , A.PARTCPT_CT AS partcptCt , A.PSNCPA AS psncpa , A.REFRN_URL AS refrnUrl , A.RCEPT_BGNDE AS rceptBeginDe , A.RCEPT_ENDDE AS rceptEndDe , A.EVENT_SE AS eventSeNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_EVENT_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.EVENT_BGNDE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_EVENT_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
